briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: To extract metadata from .note.pickle documents — a custom serialized format containing author, file size, and timestamps stored as a pickled dictionary.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: Note (.note.pickle) file metadata extraction, pickle deserialization. \par \b Input\/ \: file_path via extract(), config with logger. \par \b Output\/ \: dict with keys: file_name, file_type ("note"), size, access_time, created_time, modified_time, author. \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(6): pickle.load, BadFileFormatError] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: On pickle deserialization failure, raises BadFileFormatError. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why override can_extract with a suffix check? A: .note.pickle files have no standard MIME type and no consistent extension registry — suffix matching is the most reliable detection method. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 — Semantic template markup and LDD logging added.] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
CLASS 7[Note metadata extractor from .note.pickle files] => NoteMetadataExtractor \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
